data.title: Bankinter joins $34M Bit2Me investment for EU fintech expansion
data.description:
Bankinter joined stablecoin giant Tether in the $34 million investment round, seeking to bolster the Spanish crypto exchange’s European expansion after receiving its MiCa license in 2025.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bankinter-30m-bit2me-investment-eu-fintech-expansion?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Tether Expands Wallet Development Kit with RGB Protocol Support
data.description: According to Foresight News, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino announced via a tweet that the company's Wallet Development Kit (WDK) is undergoing continuous expansion and now includes support for the RGB protocol.

data.title: USD/JPY Experiences Short-Term Decline
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the USD/JPY currency pair experienced a short-term drop of 50 points, reaching a low of 158.19.

data.title: CZ: I no longer need to get rich quick through Meme coin investment, but I still hope Meme coin becomes more and more popular.
data.description: During his AMA livestream on Binance Square, CZ stated that he no longer needs to invest 1,000 yuan to make ten times his initial investment overnight or get rich quick through Meme coin investment. This has lost much meaning for him. He personally hopes that Meme coin will become more and more popular, and from the perspective of a builder, he hopes to create better and smoother tools.

data.title: River briefly broke through 27 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of nearly 40%.
data.description: Market data shows that RIVER briefly broke through 27 USDT and is currently trading at 27.57 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of nearly 40%.

data.title: Futureswap Contract on Arbitrum Faces Reentrancy Attack
data.description:
According to Foresight News, BlockSec Phalcon has reported that the Futureswap contract on Arbitrum has been attacked again, resulting in an estimated loss of approximately $74,000. Although the financial impact is relatively minor, the incident has highlighted a new vulnerability: a reentrancy flaw. The attacker exploited this flaw through a two-step process involving a three-day cooling period to steal funds from the protocol.

In the first step, during the minting phase, the attacker took advantage of the reentrancy vulnerability by re-entering the 0x5308fcb1 function before the contract could update its internal records. This allowed the attacker to mint a large number of LP tokens disproportionate to the actual assets deposited.

In the second step, after the mandatory three-day withdrawal cooling period, the attacker executed a withdrawal, burning the illegally minted LP tokens to redeem the underlying collateral. This effectively enabled the attacker to extract assets from the protocol and secure a profit.

data.title: CZ: I don't recommend the community focusing on me and He Yi's tweets about Meme coins.
data.description: During a Binance Square AMA livestream, CZ stated that he does not recommend the community follow his and He Yi's tweets to issue Meme coins, as this strategy has a very low success rate and it is uncertain who will issue the coins.

data.title: CZ: Bitcoin will definitely reach $200,000, but I don't know when.
data.description: CZ stated during a Binance Square AMA livestream: "Bitcoin will definitely reach $200,000, it's just a matter of time, but I don't know when."

data.title: CZ: A genuine Memecoin project needs to have "historical significance" and "legendary background".
data.description: During a live AMA on Binance Square, CZ stated, "Early investors in Meme coin also face certain risks, and subsequent buyers are conducting their own research. This phenomenon does not require third-party intervention at the moment. Genuine Meme coin projects need to have historical significance and a story, but only a very small number can truly be valuable, with a failure rate exceeding 90%. Investors need to be responsible for their own choices."

data.title: CZ: X and Binance Square have different "genes," and it's uncertain whether X will conduct KYC if it opens up crypto trading.
data.description: During a Binance Square AMA livestream, CZ stated that X and Binance Square have different "genes," with most Binance Square users having undergone KYC (Know Your Customer) procedures. He was unsure whether X would conduct KYC procedures on users if it opened up to cryptocurrency.

data.title: Bitcoin's Volatility Shifted to MSTR Stock, Analyst Suggests
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on January 14, CoinDesk analyst James Van Straten stated that during the current cycle, Strategy (MSTR) absorbed approximately 75% of the downturn, preventing Bitcoin from experiencing a similar level of decline. This shift in volatility moved from spot Bitcoin to MSTR common stock.

Meanwhile, Michael Saylor issued a large number of shares at around 1x mNAV, acting as the final buyer, which helped mitigate the formation of a bear market.

data.title: Pundi AI Collaborates with OptimAI Network to Advance AI Systems
data.description:
According to Odaily, Pundi AI has announced a partnership with OptimAI Network, the first Layer-2 enhanced data network, to advance the development of autonomous AI systems known as Agentic AI. This collaboration integrates Pundi AI's decentralized verifiable data infrastructure on the BNB Chain with OptimAI's community-enhanced intelligence, aiming to accelerate the deployment of user-owned, privacy-first AI agents globally. Since its launch in March 2025, OptimAI Network has expanded to 870,000 installation nodes and 530,000 users, establishing itself as a leader in decentralized AI within the Web3 space.

Through this partnership, Pundi AI will provide OptimAI with support for on-chain data traceability, community annotation, and transparent data ownership, ensuring that AI training utilizes open, verifiable, and community-controlled data. Both parties are committed to creating transparent, scalable, and human-interest-aligned autonomous AI systems, promoting the democratization of AI development. This milestone marks a significant step for Pundi AI in transforming data into on-chain intellectual property and enabling open participation in the AI economy. Further integrations and community plans are expected to be announced in the coming weeks.

data.title: Binance Unveils New Yield Arena Offers and Dual Investment Rewards
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has introduced new offers in its Yield Arena, providing users with opportunities to earn rewards through various products. The latest offerings include Simple Earn, ETH Staking, SOL Staking, and Dual Investment, among others. From January 9, 2026, to January 15, 2026, eligible users holding at least 0.01 USDe for 24 hours can enjoy a 5% APR reward. Additionally, users participating in the Dual Investment program from January 9, 2026, to January 31, 2026, can earn up to $5,888 in rewards through the Monthly Leaderboard program.

Flexible products such as USDT, USDC, ETH, SOL, and DOLO offer real-time APRs with bonus tiered APRs, allowing users to subscribe with minimal amounts and benefit from unlimited or capped subscription limits. Locked products like SKY, NIL, and INJ provide fixed-term APRs for durations ranging from 90 to 120 days. ETH and SOL staking options offer dynamic APRs, enabling users to earn rewards based on market conditions. Dual Investment products for BTC and ETH feature multiple settlement dates with APRs of 15% or more, providing users with high-yield opportunities.

Binance reserves the right to adjust APRs without prior notice, and offers are available on a first-come, first-served basis. Users can redeem their assets early in Simple Earn Locked Products, with the principal returned to their Spot Accounts and distributed interest deducted. Due to global time zone differences, token receipt may take up to 72 hours, with potential delays in exceptional circumstances. Users holding BNB Flexible and Locked Products positions automatically receive rewards from ongoing Launchpools and may qualify for Megadrop rewards. BNB Simple Earn subscribers can also receive airdropped tokens via HODLer Airdrops.

data.title: CZ: Prediction markets have fewer market makers and the sector is relatively new.
data.description: During a Binance Square AMA livestream, CZ stated, "There are relatively few market makers in the prediction market. To my knowledge, Polymarket only has one or two market makers, the sector is relatively new, and it is mainly concentrated in sports events."

data.title: Bitcoin OG Holders See Selling Opportunity Amid Institutional Interest
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, analyst Darkfost has concluded that the current cycle presents a prime selling opportunity for Bitcoin OG holders, those who have held Bitcoin for over five years. This opportunity arises from the influx of major institutional investors and even government buyers. However, as the cycle progresses, the sales volume from OG holders during peak market periods has been steadily declining.

The last peak in STXO, with a 90-day average of approximately 2,300 BTC, has significantly decreased, now fluctuating around 1,000 BTC. This indicates that OG holders have slowed their distribution pace. The substantial selling pressure they once exerted has evidently lessened, and the current trend appears to favor holding rather than distributing.

data.title: Bernstein Reaffirms Buy Rating for Strategy with $450 Target Price
data.description: According to Odaily, BitcoinTreasuries.NET reported on platform X that asset management firm Bernstein, which oversees $850 billion in assets, has reiterated its buy rating for Strategy (MSTR), a company holding BTC as a reserve asset. Bernstein has set a target price of $450 for the company.

data.title: Pension-usdt.eth Closes ETH Position with Significant Profit
data.description: According to Odaily, Onchain Lens monitoring has revealed that the address pension-usdt.eth (0x0dd...a902) has fully closed its 3x leveraged long position on ETH, securing a profit of $4.72 million. The address has accumulated total earnings of approximately $27 million.

data.title: The Zcash Foundation deployed five DNS seed nodes to cope with ECC node outages.
data.description: The Zcash Foundation officially announced that, in response to the service disruption of the DNS seed nodes operated by Electric Coin Company (ECC) on January 8th, it has deployed five new DNS seed nodes in the United States and Europe. The new seed nodes are located in South Carolina and Oregon in the US, and Belgium, Germany, and Finland in Europe. Currently, including the existing seed nodes, the Zcash Foundation operates a total of six seed nodes, aiming to ensure reliable node discovery for users and improve wallet and node launch performance. Furthermore, the Zcash Foundation is considering further deployments in other regions to further enhance coverage and reliability, and Shielded Labs is also working to deploy additional seed nodes.

data.title: Zcash Foundation Expands DNS Seed Nodes to Enhance Network Reliability
data.description:
According to Odaily, the Zcash Foundation has announced the deployment of five new DNS seed nodes in response to the Electric Coin Company's (ECC) decision to cease operations of its DNS seed nodes on January 8. These new nodes are located in South Carolina and Oregon in the United States, as well as in Belgium, Germany, and Finland in Europe.

With the addition of these nodes, the total number of DNS seed nodes operated by the Zcash Foundation has reached six. This expansion aims to ensure reliable node discovery for users and improve the startup performance of wallets and nodes. Furthermore, the Zcash Foundation is considering further deployments in other regions to enhance coverage and reliability. Shielded Labs is also working on deploying additional seed nodes.
